revision.text:
[[ja:石作神社 (岐南町)]] {{Expand Japanese|石作神社 (岐南町)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ishizukuri Shrine | native_name = 石作神社 | image = Ishizukuri jinja in Ginan2008-1.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ishizukuri Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.388052|136.794609}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Ishizukuri Shrine'''|石作神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province|ja|尾張国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11465292|1=List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province}} ** Series ordinal: 44 ** P155: {{ill|Q11439718|ltq=Q11439718|qid=Q11439718|1=Oono Shrine (Q11439718)}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135039492|ltq=Q135039492|qid=Q135039492|1=Ufusunano Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Ginan, Gifu|lt=Ginan|arz|جينان|ceb|Ginan-chō|en|Ginan, Gifu|es|Ginan (Gifu)|fa|گینان، گیفو|fr|Ginan|it|Ginan|ja|岐南町|ko|기난정|ms|Ginan, Gifu|my|ဂင်းနန်မြို့၊ ဂိဖု|pl|Ginan (Gifu)|ru|Гинан|sv|Ginan, Gifu|tl|Ginan, Gfu|tr|Ginan|uk|Ґінан|uz|Ginan (Gifu)|zh|岐南町|qid=Q1204285|1=Ginan, Gifu}} * {{ill|Q514506|ltq=Q514506|qid=Q514506|1=Owari Province}} * {{ill|Haguri District|lt=Haguri district|en|Haguri District|hu|Haguri körzet|ja|葉栗郡|ko|하구리군 (아이치현)|pl|Powiat Haguri|sr|Област Хагури|zh|葉栗郡|qid=Q1032507|1=Haguri District}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.388052|136.794609}} == image (P18) == * Ishizukuri jinja in Ginan2008-1.jpg == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181384 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917316|ltq=Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 5200005003535 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '岐阜県羽島郡岐南町三宅9丁目', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:石作神社 (岐南町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11585161}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=September 2020}} {{神社 | 名称 = Ishizukuri Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Ishizukuri jinja in Ginan2008-1.jpg|250px]]
Torii and haiden | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|qid=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Hashima District|Q615068|qid=Q615068|1=Hashima District, Gifu}}{{ill|lt=Ginan|Q1204285|qid=Q1204285|1=Ginan, Gifu}}{{ill|lt=Miyake (Ginan)|UNKNOWN|lt=Miyake}} 9-chōme | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = Takemarine-no-Mikoto | 社格 = {{ill|lt=Junior Third Rank|Q11071123|qid=Q11071123|1=Junior Third Rank}} Upper
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | 創建 = (trad.) {{ill|lt=Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|qid=Q1075605|lt=Jōwa|1=Jōwa (Heian period)}} 6 ({{ill|lt=839|Q23874|qid=Q23874|1=839}}) | 本殿 = | 例祭 = {{ill|lt=October 17|Q2962|qid=Q2962|1=October 17}} | 神事 = | 別名 = Ishizukuri Daimyōjin
Ishizukuri Myōjin
Ishizukuri Tenjin | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Ishizukuri Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ishizukuri Shrine''' (いしづくりじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ginan|Q1204285|qid=Q1204285|1=Ginan, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Hashima District|Q615068|qid=Q615068|1=Hashima District, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|qid=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} identified with “Ishizukuri Shrine” in Haguri District, {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|qid=Q514506|1=Owari Province}}, from the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}''. === History === Until the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period|qid=Q184963}}, it was called '''Ishizukuri Daimyōjin''' and was the {{ill|lt=ujigami|Q767655|qid=Q767655|1=Ujigami}} of Kise (a branch hamlet of Miyake Village, {{ill|lt=Haguri District|Q11610214|qid=Q11610214|1=Haguri district}}). According to shrine tradition, it was founded in {{ill|lt=Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|qid=Q1075605|lt=Jōwa|1=Jōwa (Heian period)}} 6 ({{ill|lt=839|Q23874|qid=Q23874|1=839}}). Since early modern times this area has belonged to {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|qid=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}, but it is said that before the {{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|qid=Q1145058|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} era it was in Haguri District of Owari Province, and the shrine is identified with “Ishizukuri Shrine” of Haguri District in the ''Engishiki Jinmyōchō''. There is little dissent from this identification, and {{ill|lt=Tsuda Masao|Q22123474|qid=Q22123474|1=Tsuda Masanari}} also supports it{{Sfn|Tsuda Masao|1978|p=58}}. For divine rank, the Atsuta manuscript of the ''{{ill|lt=Owari Kuninai Jinmyōchō|Q11041830|qid=Q11041830|1=Owari Kokunai Jinmyōchō}}'' has “Junior Third Rank Upper, Ishizukuri Tenjin,” while the Kōnomiya manuscript has “Senior Fourth Rank Lower, Ishizukuri Tenjin.” In {{ill|lt=1870|Q7741|qid=Q7741|1=1870}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 3), it was renamed back to Ishizukuri Shrine, and in {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|qid=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6) it became a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. In {{ill|lt=1997|Q2088|qid=Q2088|1=1997}} ({{ill|lt=Heisei|Q234510|qid=Q234510|1=Heisei era}} 9), part of the precincts was sold for improvement work on {{ill|lt=National Route 21|Q5357384|qid=Q5357384|1=Japan National Route 21}} ({{ill|lt=Gidai Bypass|Q11471280|qid=Q11471280|1=Gidai bypass}}). Proceeds were used to rebuild shrine buildings and improve the grounds. === Enshrined deity === ; Takemarine-no-Mikoto :Takemarine-no-Mikoto is said to be a sixth-generation descendant of {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411|qid=Q10940411|1=Amenohoakari}}, grandson of {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|qid=Q455602|1=Amaterasu}}. He is said to have made and presented the stone coffin of Empress {{ill|lt=Hibasuhime-no-Mikoto|Q8375821|qid=Q8375821|1=Hibasu-hime}}, consort of {{ill|lt=Emperor Suinin|Q314850|qid=Q314850|1=Emperor Suinin}}. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === Annotations === {{Notelist}} === Sources === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=125&shrname=%E2%98%85%E7%9F%B3%E4%BD%9C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE%E2%98%85　石作神社] - Gifu Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ishizukuri Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ishizukuri Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ishizukuri Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:岐南町の歴史]] [[Category:岐南町の建築物]]
